description: Métropole du Nord chaleureuse. Communauté musulmane nombreuse et restaurants halal variés à Wazemmes et au centre.

description_en: Lille may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 143 halal restaurants and 19 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Lille, France, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Lille: 143 halal restaurants listed, 19 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4/5.
